change_orders.terms: Change order is due upon approval.

templates.name: Welcome Message
templates.subject: Welcome to {{business_name}}!
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, welcome! We're excited to work with you at {{business_name}}. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

templates.name: Appointment Reminder
templates.subject: Reminder: Your appointment with {{business_name}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, this is a reminder about your upcoming appointment with {{business_name}}. Please contact us if you need to reschedule.

templates.name: Quote Follow-up
templates.subject: Following up on your quote from {{business_name}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, just following up on the quote we sent you. Let us know if you have any questions or if you'd like to move forward. Quote #{{quote_number}}.

templates.name: Invoice Payment Reminder
templates.subject: Invoice {{invoice_number}} — Payment Due {{due_date}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, this is a friendly reminder that invoice {{invoice_number}} for {{amount_due}} is due on {{due_date}}. Please contact us if you have questions.

templates.name: Project Update
templates.subject: Update on your project — {{project_name}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, we wanted to share an update on {{project_name}}. Please log in or reach out if you have any questions.

templates.name: Feedback Request
templates.subject: How did we do? — {{business_name}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, thank you for choosing {{business_name}}! We'd love to hear your feedback. Please click here: {{feedback_link}}

templates.name: Thank You Message
templates.subject: Thank you from {{business_name}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, thank you for your business! It was a pleasure working with you. We look forward to helping you again.

templates.name: Trial Expiry Reminder
templates.subject: Your {{business_name}} trial ends soon
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, your free trial with {{business_name}} ends soon. Upgrade now to keep access to all features.

templates.name: Lead Follow-up
templates.subject: Following up on your inquiry
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, thank you for your interest in {{business_name}}. I wanted to follow up on your inquiry. When would be a good time to connect?

templates.name: Customer Follow-up
templates.subject: Checking in — {{business_name}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, I'm reaching out to check in and see how everything is going. Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything.

templates.name: Site Visit Confirmation
templates.subject: Site Visit Confirmed — {{project_name}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, your site visit for {{project_name}} is confirmed. We look forward to meeting with you. Please let us know if anything changes.

templates.name: Meeting Reminder
templates.subject: Reminder: Meeting with {{business_name}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, this is a reminder about your scheduled meeting with {{business_name}}. See you soon!

templates.name: Payment Received
templates.subject: Payment Received — Thank You!
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, we have received your payment. Thank you! Please keep this message for your records.

templates.name: Project Completion Message
templates.subject: Your project is complete — {{project_name}}
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, we are pleased to let you know that {{project_name}} is complete. It was a pleasure working with you. Thank you for choosing {{business_name}}!

templates.name: Review Request
templates.subject: Could you leave us a review?
templates.body: Hi {{contact_name}}, we hope you are happy with our work! If you have a moment, we would really appreciate a review. Your feedback means a lot to {{business_name}}.

templates.name: Basic Service Quote
templates.subject: Quote for Services — {{business_name}}
templates.body: Thank you for the opportunity to work with you. Please find our quote for services below. This quote is valid for 30 days. Contact us with any questions.

templates.name: Kitchen Remodel Quote
templates.subject: Kitchen Remodel Quote — {{business_name}}
templates.body: Thank you for considering {{business_name}} for your kitchen remodel. We have prepared a detailed quote based on our site assessment. All materials and labor are included as specified.

templates.name: Bathroom Remodel Quote
templates.subject: Bathroom Remodel Quote — {{business_name}}
templates.body: Please find our quote for your bathroom remodel project. We use quality materials and our work is fully warrantied. We look forward to transforming your space.

templates.name: Labor + Materials Quote
templates.subject: Labor & Materials Estimate — {{business_name}}
templates.body: This quote covers labor and materials as discussed. Any additional scope changes will be documented as a change order before work proceeds.

templates.name: Deposit Quote
templates.subject: Deposit Required — {{business_name}}
templates.body: To secure your project start date, a deposit is required. The balance is due upon project completion. Thank you for choosing {{business_name}}.

templates.name: Standard Invoice
templates.subject: Invoice {{invoice_number}} from {{business_name}}
templates.body: Please find your invoice attached. Payment is due by {{due_date}}. Thank you for your business.

templates.name: Deposit Invoice
templates.subject: Deposit Invoice {{invoice_number}} — {{business_name}}
templates.body: This invoice covers the agreed deposit to begin your project. The remaining balance will be invoiced upon completion.

templates.name: Progress Payment Invoice
templates.subject: Progress Payment — {{project_name}}
templates.body: This invoice represents a progress payment milestone for {{project_name}}. Thank you for your continued partnership.

templates.name: Final Invoice
templates.subject: Final Invoice — {{project_name}}
templates.body: Thank you for choosing {{business_name}}. This is your final invoice for {{project_name}}. It has been a pleasure working with you.

templates.name: Past Due Reminder
templates.subject: Past Due: Invoice {{invoice_number}}
templates.body: This is a reminder that invoice {{invoice_number}} for {{amount_due}} is past due. Please arrange payment as soon as possible or contact us to discuss payment options.

templates.name: Payment Received Confirmation
templates.subject: Payment Confirmed — {{business_name}}
templates.body: Your payment has been received. Thank you! Invoice {{invoice_number}} is now marked as paid. Please keep this confirmation for your records.

help_faqs.question: What is Clear Build USA?
help_faqs.answer: Clear Build USA is a business management platform built for contractors and trade businesses. It helps you manage contacts, quotes, projects, invoices, payments, and team communication in one place.

help_faqs.question: How do I create my first quote?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Quotes in the sidebar and click "New Quote". Select a contact, add line items, set the valid-until date, and save. You can then send it to your customer with a review link.

help_faqs.question: How do I create a project?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Projects and click "New Project". Fill in the project name, assign a contact, set a budget and timeline, and save. Projects can be linked to quotes and invoices.

help_faqs.question: Can I have multiple businesses?
help_faqs.answer: Yes. You can create or join multiple businesses. Use the Business Switcher in the top bar to switch between them. Each business has its own separate data.

help_faqs.question: Is there a mobile app?
help_faqs.answer: Clear Build USA is a mobile-responsive web app. Open it in your phone browser for an app-like experience with bottom navigation. You can add it to your home screen for quick access.

help_faqs.question: Why do I need to verify my email?
help_faqs.answer: Email verification ensures your account is secure and that you can receive important notifications about quotes, invoices, and team activity.

help_faqs.question: I forgot my password. How do I reset it?
help_faqs.answer: Click "Forgot?" on the login page and enter your email. You will receive a password reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if you don't see it.

help_faqs.question: How do I change my email address?
help_faqs.answer: Currently, email changes require contacting support. Submit a support ticket with your current and new email address.

help_faqs.question: Can multiple people log in with the same account?
help_faqs.answer: No. Each team member should have their own account. Use the Team Invitations feature to invite colleagues to your business.

help_faqs.question: How do I set up my business profile?
help_faqs.answer: After registration, you will be guided through the Business Setup flow. You can also update your business details anytime in Settings > Business Profile.

help_faqs.question: How do I set my quote and invoice prefixes?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Settings > Tax & Numbering. You can set custom prefixes for quotes (e.g. Q-), invoices (e.g. INV-), and projects (e.g. PRJ-). Numbers auto-increment.

help_faqs.question: Can I upload a business logo?
help_faqs.answer: Yes. Go to Settings > Business Profile and upload a PNG or JPG logo (max 2 MB). It will appear on your quotes and invoices.

help_faqs.question: What is the difference between a Lead and a Customer?
help_faqs.answer: Leads are potential clients you are still working to close. Customers are confirmed clients. You can convert a Lead to a Customer once the deal is won.

help_faqs.question: How do I convert a lead to a customer?
help_faqs.answer: Open the contact, click the Actions menu, and select "Convert to Customer". The contact type updates immediately.

help_faqs.question: Can I import contacts from another system?
help_faqs.answer: Bulk import is not yet available. You can add contacts one at a time through the Contacts page. Contact support for bulk import assistance.

help_faqs.question: How do I track lead status?
help_faqs.answer: Each contact has a Lead Status field. You can set it to: New Lead, In Conversation, Meeting Scheduled, Site Visit, Proposal Sent, Negotiation, Won, or Lost.

help_faqs.question: How do I send a quote to a customer?
help_faqs.answer: Open the quote and click "Send". This generates a unique review link and emails it to the customer. They can view, approve, or reject the quote online.

help_faqs.question: Can a customer approve a quote online?
help_faqs.answer: Yes. When you send a quote, the customer receives an email with a link to view and approve it. Their approval is logged and you are notified.

help_faqs.question: What happens after a quote is approved?
help_faqs.answer: The quote status changes to "Approved". You can then create an invoice directly from the quote or create a linked project.

help_faqs.question: How do I add optional line items?
help_faqs.answer: When adding a line item to a quote, check the "Optional" checkbox. Optional items are shown to the customer but not included in the base total.

help_faqs.question: How do I link a project to a quote or invoice?
help_faqs.answer: When creating an invoice or quote, you can select an existing project from the Project dropdown. Projects can also be linked when creating them.

help_faqs.question: What project statuses are available?
help_faqs.answer: Projects can be: Active, Scheduled, On Hold, or Completed. Update the status from the project detail page.

help_faqs.question: How do I track project updates?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Project Updates in the sidebar. You can log notes, progress updates, and milestones for any project.

help_faqs.question: How do I send an invoice to a customer?
help_faqs.answer: Open the invoice and click "Send Invoice". This emails the invoice details to the customer. The invoice status updates to "Sent".

help_faqs.question: How do I record a payment?
help_faqs.answer: Go to the Payments page or open an invoice and click "Record Payment". Enter the amount, date, and payment method.

help_faqs.question: Why can I not edit a sent invoice?
help_faqs.answer: Once an invoice is sent, line items and pricing are locked to maintain financial integrity. To make changes, duplicate the invoice and send a new one.

help_faqs.question: What payment methods can I record?
help_faqs.answer: You can record Cash, Check, Bank Transfer, Credit Card, or Other payments. These are for record-keeping purposes within the app.

help_faqs.question: How do I see how much a customer owes?
help_faqs.answer: Open the contact page. It shows the lifetime value and linked invoices. The invoice detail page shows amount due vs amount received.

help_faqs.question: How do I send a message to a customer?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Communications and use the "Send Notification" option. You can send via Email, SMS draft, or WhatsApp draft. Templates are available to save time.

help_faqs.question: How do WhatsApp and SMS messages work?
help_faqs.answer: Clicking WhatsApp or SMS opens a pre-filled draft in your phone app. You send it directly from your device. This keeps your number private.

help_faqs.question: Can I create message templates?
help_faqs.answer: Yes. Go to the Templates page to create and manage reusable message templates for notifications, communications, quotes, and invoices.

help_faqs.question: How do I invite a team member?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Team and click "Invite Member". Enter their email and select a role. They will receive an invitation email.

help_faqs.question: What roles are available?
help_faqs.answer: Owner, Manager, Staff, Crew, and Viewer. Each role has different access levels. Owners have full access. Viewers have read-only access.

help_faqs.question: Can I remove a team member?
help_faqs.answer: Yes. Open the team member and click "Remove". They will immediately lose access to the business. You can re-invite them later.

help_faqs.question: How long is the free trial?
help_faqs.answer: The free trial is 15 days. No credit card is required to start. You can access all features during the trial period.

help_faqs.question: What happens when the trial ends?
help_faqs.answer: After the trial ends, you can still log in and view your existing data. Creating, editing, or sending records requires an active subscription.

help_faqs.question: How do I upgrade to a paid plan?
help_faqs.answer: Go to the Subscription page and select a Monthly or Yearly plan. You will be redirected to the Stripe checkout page to enter payment details.

help_faqs.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
help_faqs.answer: Yes. Click "Open Billing Portal" on the Subscription page to manage, change, or cancel your subscription through the Stripe portal.

help_faqs.question: What is the Scheduling feature?
help_faqs.answer: Scheduling lets you create available time slots and share booking links with contacts. When a customer books a slot, you both receive confirmation emails and the meeting appears in your Scheduled Meetings list.

help_faqs.question: How do I create a booking link?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Scheduling > Booking Links and click "Create Link". Select the available slots you want to offer, optionally link a contact, and generate the link. You can share it via email, WhatsApp, or SMS.

help_faqs.question: Does the customer need an account to book?
help_faqs.answer: No. The booking page is public. If you pre-selected a contact, their info is pre-filled. Otherwise, the customer enters their name, email, and phone before selecting a slot.

help_faqs.question: Verification email not received
help_faqs.answer: Check your spam or junk folder. Make sure you entered the correct email. Wait up to 5 minutes. You can request a resend from the login page by clicking "Resend verification email".

help_faqs.question: Data not showing after switching business
help_faqs.answer: After switching, the page reloads with data for the selected business. If data is missing, refresh the page. Each business shows only its own data.

help_faqs.question: Invoice email not sent
help_faqs.answer: Check that the contact has a valid email address. Check your Resend API key in environment settings. If email is not configured, emails are logged to the console only.

help_faqs.question: Payment not updating invoice balance
help_faqs.answer: Refresh the invoice page after recording a payment. The balance due recalculates from all linked payment records. Make sure the payment was linked to the correct invoice.

help_faqs.question: Quote approval link not opening
help_faqs.answer: The quote must be in "Sent" status for the review link to work. If the quote was re-saved to Draft, resend it. Links use the quote ID and are permanently valid unless the quote is deleted.

help_faqs.question: How do I add a contact?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Contacts → click "Add Contact". Fill in the name, email, and phone. The contact will be added as a Lead by default.

help_faqs.question: How do I create a quote?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Quotes → click "New Quote". Select a customer, add line items, and click "Save & Send" to email the quote to your customer.

help_faqs.question: How do I create an invoice?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Invoices → click "New Invoice". Select a customer, add line items, and click "Review & Send".

help_faqs.question: How do I record a payment?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Payments → click "Record Payment". Select the invoice, enter the amount and payment method, then save.

help_faqs.question: How do I reverse a payment?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Payments, find the payment, and click the reverse icon. Only owners and admins can reverse payments.

help_faqs.question: How do I invite a team member?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Team → click "Invite Member". Enter their email and select a role. They will receive an email invite.

help_faqs.question: How do I change my business logo?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Settings → Business Profile → click the logo area to upload a new image.

help_faqs.question: How do I set my tax rate?
help_faqs.answer: Go to Settings → Tax & Numbering. Set your default tax rate and it will be applied to new quotes and invoices.
